title: Nardosmia laevigata
taxonomy: Nardosmia laevigata is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is an annual hemiparasitic herb, which means it obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. Nardosmia laevigata was previously classified in the family Scrophulariaceae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Orobanchaceae family.
